title: The Spectral Sequence of a Covering
journal: Proceedings of the Edinburgh Mathematical Society
abstract: Let  be a covering of a topological space X and ℱ a sheaf of abelian groups over X. By a well known result of Leray, (3) II theorems 5.2.4. and 5.4.1., if  is open, or closed and locally finite, there exists a spectral sequence {Er} satisfying isomorphisms  and  for some filtration of the graded group H*(X, ℱ). ℋq(ℱ) denotes the system of coefficients over : s→Hq(| s |, ℱ).
